docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $180) SERVED JAN-30-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, KHARISMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON (SC-108) - REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT [FILED:06/23/22 RE: THE COURT'S CALCULATIONS IN THE STATEMENT OF DECISION]. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: EITHER PARTY HAS THE RIGHT TO FILE AN APPEAL OF THE 5/11/22 JUDGMENT WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER(7/18/22).
SC-108 REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE. FILED BY DEFENDANT CALDERON, KHARISMA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUNT, ADELAIDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, KHARISMA $1,701.02 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,901.02, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ANSWER TO SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALDERON, KHARISMA
REMARK: UN-SIGNED SUBMISSION OF CALCULATIONS RECEIVED JUL-08-22 (VIA DROPBOX)AFTER CLOSE OF BUSINESS. FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,737.37 FILED BY PUNT, ADELAIDE AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, KHARISMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO FILE A CROSS CLAIM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CALDERON, KHARISMA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT PUNT, ADELAIDE $459.17 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $489.17, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) RE: ERRORS IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CALDERON, KHARISMA
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. [RE: THE COURT'S CALCULATIONS IN THE STATEMENT OF DECISION - SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT CALDERON]
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) [RE: THE COURT'S CALCULATIONS IN THE STATEMENT OF DECISION] FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUNT, ADELAIDE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT ADELAIDE PUNT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT KHARISMA CALDERON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE 3/2/22 PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
(SC-108)ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUNT, ADELAIDE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADELAIDE PUNT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KHARISMA CALDERON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENTED SC-120 PAPERWORK TO THE PLAINTIFF AS AN EXHIBIT. THE COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER FOR THE DEFENDANT TO FILE HER CROSS CLAIM. THE PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE AND WAS GIVEN A COURTSEY COPY OF THE SC-120. THE DEFENDANT DID NOT HAVE SC-120 FILED AND DID NOT BRING EXHIBITS FOR A HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,116.34 FILED BY CALDERON, KHARISMA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PUNT, ADELAIDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT ADELAIDE PUNT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT KHARISMA CALDERON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE 3/2/22 PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). OTHER ORDERS: DEFENDENT CALDERON NEEDS TO SUBMIT HER CALCULATIONS TO THE COURT BY JULY 8, 2022, TO DETERMINE IF THE TOTALS SHOULD BE REVISED.
